summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Gelombang 3 finance features (F-7, F-8, F-9). Backend APIs verified via Python test (13/13 passed). Frontend UI flows verified via Playwright (login, suspense panel, closing view). All features working correctly: Suspense report/reclass, Monthly/Annual closing with residual logic, Stale detection, Reclose functionality, Trial balance integrity.
passed_tests: Backend: Login authentication (admin@kainnusantara.id)
Backend: F-8 GET /api/gl/suspense - Initial balance -Rp 10,000,000 verified
Backend: F-8 POST /api/gl/suspense/reclass - Reclassified to Rp 0 successfully
Backend: F-9 GET /api/finance/closing/preview (monthly Juni 2026) - Can close: true, Net income: Rp 66,750,000
Backend: F-9 POST /api/finance/closing/close (monthly Juni 2026) - Closed successfully, Journal: KSC/JE-00027
Backend: F-9 GET /api/finance/closing/preview (annual 2026) - RESIDUAL logic working (10,050,000 < 76,800,000)
Backend: F-9 POST /api/finance/closing/close (annual 2026) - Closed successfully, Journal: KSC/JE-00028
Backend: F-9b POST /api/gl/journal (backdated 2026-06-15) - Backdated journal created: KSC/JE-00029
Backend: F-9b GET /api/finance/closing - STALE detection working (June marked as stale)
Backend: F-9b POST /api/finance/closing/{id}/reclose - Reclose successful, June no longer stale
Backend: F-7 GET /api/gl/trial-balance - BALANCED (Debit = Credit = Rp 95,413,000)
Frontend: Login with demo-login-admin-button - Dashboard loaded successfully
Frontend: F-8 Navigate to KEUANGAN > Buku Besar > Suspense tab - Panel loaded
Frontend: F-8 Suspense banner visible with balance -Rp 5,000,000 (amber warning)
Frontend: F-8 Reclass form visible with all fields (entity, side, amount, target, submit)
Frontend: F-8 Suspense entries table visible with 3 journal entries
Frontend: F-9 Navigate to KEUANGAN > Tutup Buku - Closing view loaded
Frontend: F-9 Entity selector present (KSC selected)
Frontend: F-9 KPIs visible (Periode Tertutup: 2, Total Riwayat: 2)
Frontend: F-9 Form controls present (period type, month, year, preview, close buttons)
Frontend: F-9 Closing history table visible with 2 records
Frontend: F-9b STALE badge visible on Tahun 2026 closing
Frontend: F-9b 'Tutup Ulang' (Reclose) button visible and accessible
All data-testid attributes present and working correctly
